title: 2 Pack Mortice Door Bolts with Star Keys,Stainless Steel Anti-Theft Door Security Rack Bolts,Enhanced Home and Workplace Protection,Ideal for Doors and Windows,Includes Matching Screws,Easy to Install
features: Enhanced Security for Doors and Windows - These mortice door bolts provide an additional concealed locking point, effectively enhancing the security of your doors and windows. Installed near the top and bottom of doors, they offer reliable protection, making them ideal for internal and external doors or windows in homes, hotels, or factories.

Durable and Weather-Resistant Materials - Made from high-quality stainless steel and brass, these mortice door bolts are resistant to rust and corrosion, ensuring long-lasting durability. With a polished chrome or brass finish, they not only offer robust security but also complement modern interior and exterior fittings.

Easy Installation and Operation - The mortice rack bolts are simple to install and use. A standard star key (included) smoothly operates the bolt, allowing for easy opening and closing. Perfect for those looking for a user-friendly solution to enhance home security without professional assistance or complex tools.

Versatile Application for Added Safety - Suitable for a wide range of doors and windows, these mortice bolts are perfect for fire doors, corridor doors, and more. Whether for residential or commercial use, they provide additional security by offering a hidden locking mechanism that blends seamlessly with the door’s design.

Complete Security Kit with All Necessary Components - The package includes two mortice rack bolts, key escutcheons, receiver plates, face plates, star keys, and fixing screws. This comprehensive set ensures you have everything you need for installation, making it a convenient and cost-effective security solution for your property.
